headline: T. Rowe Price 529 Refresh Highlights Education Focus And Valuation Upside Potential
summary: T. Rowe Price Group has renamed its long running college savings plan to "T. Rowe Price 529" to mark the plan's 25th anniversary. The firm has introduced a new $250 matching incentive program aimed at encouraging new and existing investors to fund education savings accounts. This move highlights a refreshed focus on education oriented clients and efforts to drive account growth and engagement. T. Rowe Price Group, trading under NasdaqGS:TROW, is putting fresh attention on a core retail...
